arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund XI vs Lille – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund head to Lille this evening looking to secure their place in the Champions League quarter-finals. Last season’s runners-up have endured a tough campaign domestically but are in contention to reach the last eight in Europe.
